name: Earthbend the Meta
tagline: Triumph of the Hordes one-card closer from an earthbent board
idea: The deck operates on three synergistic layers that all feed each other through Toph's static ability and the earthbend mechanic.

briefKills.line: Scute Swarm at 6+ lands + Purphoros (+ Impact Tremors / Cathars' Crusade) → each landfall copies Scute → 2 dmg to EACH opp per body → 20+ to each opp
Triumph of the Hordes + 3 earthbent lands at 4+ counters → +1/+1, trample & INFECT → 10 poison kills regardless of life

openings: Weakest axis — Kill reliability (4/5): the judges' soft spot.
Lands-matter board also a payoff axis; BOARD union keeps on-curve no-ramp-spell hands.
Decap never-closes in 1% of goldfish games — a grind risk.
Tables (all three) never-close 7% of the time.

clock.caption: Decap (one opponent) lands around T8; the full table around T11.

gamePlan: The deck operates on three synergistic layers that all feed each other through Toph's static ability and the earthbend mechanic.
winLine: Triumph of the Hordes one-card closer from an earthbent board

finishers.name: Scute Swarm Exponential + Purphoros
finishers.note: With 6+ lands, each landfall creates a copy of Scute Swarm.

finishers.name: Triumph of the Hordes
finishers.note: {2}{G}{G}: all creatures get +1/+1, trample, and infect.

finishers.name: Moraug Extra Combats
finishers.note: Each landfall triggers an extra combat phase.

finishers.name: Toph Greatest Earthbender Double Strike
finishers.note: Toph Greatest Earthbender ETB earthbends X (X = mana spent to cast — typically 4, can be discounted by Earth Crystal's "green spells cost {1} less" to 3).

finishers.name: All Will Be One Burn
finishers.note: Each +1/+1 counter placed deals that much damage.

finishers.name: Purphoros + Awaken the Woods
finishers.note: Awaken the Woods for X creates X 1/1 Forest Dryad creature tokens.

rulings.name: Earthbend's return clause fires on death OR exile, NOT on bounce.
rulings.note: A wiped or Path'd land comes back tapped (as a plain land). Cyclonic Rift is the worst case — it bounces to hand, so nothing returns.

rulings.name: Treasure tokens do NOT become lands.
rulings.note: Toph's static is nontoken artifacts only — Smothering Tithe and Bootleggers' Stash Treasures are ramp, not landfall triggers. The Stash itself is a nontoken artifact and does become a land.

rulings.name: Amplifier ordering: additive before multiplicative.
rulings.note: Hardened Scales (+1) first, then Earth Crystal (×2) and Doubling Season (×2). Applying +1 last wastes the doubling.

rulings.name: All Will Be One only hits opponents
rulings.note: target opponent / a creature or planeswalker an opponent controls. It can't target your own stuff or your face. It triggers once per event (the final counter total), not once per counter.

rulings.name: Commander protection line
rulings.note: Liquimetal Coating/Torque makes Toph an artifact → her own static makes her a land → earthbend her → she gains the return clause and dodges removal without commander tax. She's a 2/2 while earthbent (0/0 + 2 counters), so she hits softer.

rulings.name: The four Toph variants have different names
rulings.note: the legend rule doesn't apply, run them all at once.

rulings.name: Annie Joins Up doubles legendary triggered abilities only
rulings.note: (Toph's earthbend, Tannuk, etc.) — NOT replacement effects like Doubling Season or Hardened Scales.

keep.mixed: lands-matter board also a payoff axis; BOARD union keeps on-curve no-ramp-spell hands

mull.strategy: Looking for: ramp + Toph castable by T3–4, plus at least one engine piece (a landfall payoff, an amplifier, or an early earthbend source). An on-curve Toph hand with an engine piece but no explicit ramp spell is still a keep — lands alone cast Toph on time, and shipping those hands measured as a loss (the sim's ramp-only keep model over-mulls exactly this shape). Conversely, don't dig deep: priced-mulligan testing measured aggressive digging at −4pp on the T7 front edge (London experiment 2026-07-03).

killTree.title: Earthbend the Meta — Toph, the First Metalbender
killTree.root:
Toph resolved — your nontoken artifacts are LANDS (each artifact ETB is a landfall)
end step earthbends a land into a 0/0+counters creature
killTree.stall:
ramp + animate lands each end step, stacking counters under the amplifier suite —
the deck doesn't tutor, so dig for a finisher while Scute snowballs
killTree.caption: cheapest line first · fall to the next

lines.need:
Scute Swarm at 6+ lands + Purphoros
(+ Impact Tremors / Cathars' Crusade)
lines.kill: each landfall copies Scute → 2 dmg to EACH opp per body → 20+ to each opp

lines.need:
Triumph of the Hordes
+ 3 earthbent lands at 4+ counters
lines.kill: +1/+1, trample & INFECT → 10 poison kills regardless of life

lines.need:
All Will Be One + amplifier suite
(Hardened Scales / Earth Crystal / Doubling Season)
lines.kill: each +1/+1 counter placed → that much to ONE opp; earthbend 2 = 12+

lines.need:
Toph, Greatest Earthbender (double strike)
+ 3–4 earthbent lands (8–24 each)
lines.kill: land-creatures swing for lethal double-strike damage on one opp

lines.need:
Moraug + multiple land drops
+ double-strike land-creatures (fallback)
lines.kill: 3–5 extra combat phases → lethal through accumulated steps on one opp

axisGloss.MANA: keep ramp (or a high-curve land hand)
axisGloss.BOARD: deploy the commander ~on curve + have an early (cmc≤3) play
